tiers.name: Basic VPS
tiers.desc: Our basic VPS offering is the most cost-effective. Most locations offer local peering; some locations offer direct cost-effective peering with China. VPS can be migrated between locations anytime free of charge, without data loss.

tiers.name: E-Commerce VPS
tiers.desc: E-Commerce VPS products offer the best possible connectivity, including premium China connectivity in most locations, while still being relatively inexpensive. VPS can be migrated between locations anytime free of charge, without data loss.

tiers.name: E-Commerce+SLA
tiers.desc:
E-Commerce SLA VPS offers the best cost-to-performance balance, including premium China connectivity, backed by a 99.99% Service Level Agreement.

Networking & IP
  • IPv4: 1 dedicated address
  • IPv6: routed /64 subnet
  • Secondary private network interface
  • Instant rDNS (PTR) update from control panel
  • Free IP change once every 2 weeks

Connectivity

  • Dual redundant edge routers, core switches, top-of-rack switches
  • Best in class USA-China routing:
        China Telecom CN2 GIA/CTGNet AS4809/AS23764
        China Unicom Premium AS10099
        China Mobile CMIN2 AS58807
  • Direct peering with Apple, Google, Facebook, Bytedance and other networks
  • Multiple 100Gbps uplinks with automatic failover

Infrastructure & reliability

  • Tier III facility; certifications: SOC 1 Type 2, SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001, NIST 800-53, PCI DSS, HIPAA
  • Dual diverse power feeds to each physical node with UPS and diesel generator backups
  • Dual NIC / dual diverse fiber paths to each physical node
  • 24/7 monitoring with alerts directly to our 24/7 NOC

At this time only USCA_5 location can offer a 99.99% Service Level Agreement.

tiers.name: Ultra VPS
tiers.desc: Absolute best, no-compromise connectivity to China, with lowest possible latency.
